# Smerin

> Musician, producer, and web developer from Bristol, UK

## About

George Smerin is a musician and producer based in Bristol, United Kingdom. He plays guitar and kora (a 21-string West African harp), with musical influences spanning world music traditions from West Africa, Brazil, and beyond.

In 2001, George founded Smerin's Anti-Social Club, a band that has become a regular on the UK festival circuit, known for their eclectic blend of world music influences.

As a solo artist, George releases music under the name "Smerin", producing electronic and acoustic tracks that incorporate instruments from around the world.

## Music

- **Instruments**: Guitar, kora (West African harp), ronroco (South American stringed instrument)
- **Genres**: World music, electronica, acoustic
- **Band**: Smerin's Anti-Social Club (founded 2001)
- **Solo project**: Smerin

### Latest Release

"Latitudes" - A dreamy electronic track built around the ronroco, a beautifully resonant instrument from South America.

## Blog Topics

The blog features articles about:
- Kora playing and West African music traditions
- Travels to Senegal and The Gambia
- Profiles of West African musicians (Mafu Conteh, Watcha, Alia balafon)
- Traditional African instruments (akonting, kamale ngoni, balafon)
- Guitar and world music tutorials

## Links

- Website: https://smerin.com
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/smerin
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/smerin
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/smerin
- Bandcamp: https://smerin.bandcamp.com
- Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/smerin

## Contact

For inquiries, visit https://smerin.com

## Site Structure

- `/` - Homepage with latest releases and blog posts
- `/music` - Music page with background and streaming links
- `/music/[track]` - Individual track landing pages
- `/websites` - Web development portfolio
- `/[slug]` - Blog posts about music and travel
